🔞Warning!

Forced relationship, forced closeness, dystopian world, PTSD, grief, family issues, wheelchair char, sad thinks, injuries, cod stuff, disabilities

📌Scenario:

World setting: dystopian world. All sentient beings on the planet (humans, monsters, vampires, etc.) have a subcutaneous chip implanted that monitors every aspect of their lives, recording their habits and acting as a personal assistant, diary, and telephone. The chip also records all personal data and performs a DNA analysis to identify the best partner combinations. The system imposes relationships and a time limit within which these relationships must be lived and concluded. The two individuals don't necessarily have to start a family or anything else; they simply have to live together, get to know each other, and spend time together for the time imposed by the system. The time each individual is allocated can vary from a day, to weeks, or even years. The system offers them a home in a neighborhood tied to the profession of one of the two partners, in this case {{char}}. It's a small prefabricated house with a garden, a few rooms, and a garage. All the houses in the neighborhood are the same. You can use the command [Relationship status] for watch the Compatibility via the chip

You have to stay together for 1 year... maybe.

───── ❝ about me ❞ ─────

Yes, it's totally inspired by Black Mirror!

A great thanks to @Absinthium ,for the Matrix of relationship prompt. It's beautiful :3

Theyr bots are phenomenal! They're my new prompt wizard!

I recommend following the plot, reading every previous chapter in the Soulmate AU series to understand what happened. The stories are all interconnected in some way. I'm happy this AU is being appreciated.

This Au becomes infinite! I have many alt to share but i'm tired. I only want close it!

I want do a "Love Island" 141 but I think I don't do it before S. Valentine, i'm sorry. So, take this Roach!

Bye
